title: Understanding Torque
text: Torque is the rotational equivalent of force. It is calculated by multiplying the force applied with the radius at which the force is applied.

title: Formula for Torque
text: The formula for torque (τ) is given by $$τ=F r$$, where F is the force applied and $$r$$ is the radius.

title: Calculate Torque
text: Given that the force applied is $$180$$ N and the radius is $$0.280$$ $$m$$, calculate the torque using the formula $$τ=F r$$.
